title: AL's Squids & Nautiluses
description: A pack that revamps Squids and Nautiluses and adds more variants!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9317544e41d2f6edfa84fbe814f27e686211fa3.png)

# 

A pack that revamps Squids and Nautiluses and adds more variants by changing the models and textures!

I made this as a more "Vanilla style" pack while still giving them a well needed revamp.



Features:

-Squids and Glow Squids have a better-looking texture with the baby model now looking how they do in Minecraft Dungeons!

-Glow Squids have a 1/100 chance of spawning as a giant "Eponymous Squid", another reference to Minecraft Dungeons.

(This variant can also be obtained manually via renaming it to **Eponymous Squid** or **Nanaimoteuthis**) 

-Nautilus, Zombie Nautilus, and Coral Zombie Nautilus now actually look like real nautiluses instead of half-baked ammonites.

-Miss the ammonite look of the vanilla Nautilus? No problem! renaming any Nautilus to **Ammonite** will turn it into a better, more accurate looking ammonite!

-New, better, textures for Nautilus Armor






 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
